eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Baca, CO; at 12:50 PM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 08:50 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Baca County CO Urgent: Town of Campo, as well as all rural residences South of Road J between County Road 21 and US Hwy 287 are under pre-evacuation for fast moving wildfire. Prepare now for a possible evacuation to the north. Fire is south and west of Campo moving North/Northeast.
